definition.en: Natural aggression provides the charge for all creativity.
definition.zh: 自然攻击性为所有创造力提供动力。

definition.en: Natural aggression is the creative loving thrust forward, the way in which love is activated, the fuel through whose agency love propels itself.
definition.zh: 自然攻击性是创造性的、充满爱意的前冲力，是爱被激活的方式，是爱借以推动自身的燃料。

definition.en: Aggression in the most basic terms has nothing to do with physical violence as you think of it, but with the force through which love is perpetuated and creatively renewed.
definition.zh: 在最基本的层面上，攻击性与你们所认为的身体暴力毫无关系，而是与那种使爱得以延续并创造性更新的力量有关。

definition.en: Natural aggression is simply the power to act.
definition.zh: 自然攻击性就是行动的能力。

definition.en: Your material form is alive through natural aggression, the poised, forceful and directed action that is the carrier for creativity.
definition.zh: 你们的物质形态通过自然攻击性而充满活力，这种平衡、有力且定向的行动是创造力的载体。

explanation:
自然攻击性是所有创造力的动力来源。它不是暴力的冲动，而是爱得以激活和推进的燃料。爱需要通过自然攻击性来驱动自己，实现创造性的更新。自然攻击性与身体暴力无关，它是生命延续和创造力更新的根本力量。

当你感到无力时，就无法运用自身的疗愈能力，只能依赖外在的医生或治疗师。这种依赖反而削弱了你的自我信念。压抑自然攻击性会导致更严重的问题——被压抑的能量会以扭曲的形式爆发，造成不成比例的伤害。

自然攻击性也体现在性别和被动性上。出生本身就是一次攻击性体验。真正的被动性建立在对自然攻击性的欣然认知之上——只有确信自身力量和本质的人，才能安然处于被动状态。否则，被动会带来深层恐惧。

quotes.text: Natural aggression provides the charge for all creativity. Now reading this, many readers will be taken back, for they believe that love is the impetus, and that love is opposed to aggression. There is no such artificial division. Natural aggression is the creative loving thrust forward, the way in which love is activated, the fuel through whose agency love propels itself. (With emphasis:) Aggression in the most basic terms has nothing to do with physical violence as you think of it, but with the force through which love is perpetuated and creatively renewed.
quotes.translation: 自然攻击性为所有创造力提供动力。读到此处，许多读者会感到困惑，因为他们相信爱是驱动力，而爱是与攻击性对立的。不存在这种人为的划分。自然攻击性是充满创造力的爱的向前推进，是爱被激活的方式，是爱借以推动自身的燃料。（强调地：）最根本而言，攻击性与你们所认为的肢体暴力毫无关系，而是与那股让爱得以永续并创造性更新的力量有关。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The use of your private energy brings you into intimate relationship with your own source of power. Healing involves great natural aggressive thrusts of energy, growth, and the focus of vitality. The more powerless you feel, the less able you are to utilize your own healing abilities. You are then forced to project these outward upon a physician, a healer, or any outside agency. If your own belief in the physician "works" and you are cured of symptoms, you are physically relieved, and yet your own belief in yourself may be further infringed upon. If you are making no effective efforts to handle your own problems, then the symptoms will simply reappear in a new fashion, and the same process will be reinitiated. You may lose faith in your doctor while still retaining confidence in doctors as a whole, and run from one to another.
quotes.translation: 运用你个人的能量，会让你与自身的力量源头建立亲密关系。疗愈涉及巨大的自然攻击性能量涌动、成长以及生命力的聚焦。你越感到无力，就越无法运用自身的疗愈能力。于是你被迫将这些能力向外投射到医生、疗愈师或任何外在机构上。如果你对医生的信念"奏效"了，症状得以治愈，你的身体虽然得到缓解，但你对自身的信念可能进一步受损。如果你没有为自己的问题做出有效努力，那么症状只会以新的形式重现，同样的过程会再次启动。你可能会对某位医生失去信心，却仍对整个医疗体系保持信任，于是从一个医生换到另一个医生。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Birth is an aggressive experience. Passivity is based upon the joyful recognition of natural aggression. To be carried along, each of you must be very sure of yourself. To allow yourself what is now, in your terms, a luxury of passivity, you must have confidence in the nature of your own reality and strength. Otherwise passivity frightens you to the core.
quotes.translation: 出生是一种攻击性体验。被动性建立在对自然攻击性的喜悦认知之上。要随波逐流，你们每个人都必须对自己有十足把握。要允许自己享有——用你们的话说——被动性这种奢侈品，你们必须对自身实相与力量的本性充满信心。否则，被动性会让你们恐惧到骨子里。

quotes.text: Usually there are a variety of physical actions, not involving killing, that would suffice. As long as you believe that violence must be met with violence you court it and its consequences. On individual terms, your own body and mind become the battleground, as does the physical body of the earth in mass terms. Your material form is alive through natural aggression, the poised, forceful and directed action that is the carrier for creativity.
quotes.translation: 通常有各种不涉及杀戮的身体行动就足以解决问题。只要你们相信暴力必须以暴力回击，你们就是在招引暴力及其后果。就个人层面而言，你们的身心会成为战场；就集体层面而言，地球的物理身体也是如此。你们的物质形态通过自然攻击性而鲜活存在——这种蓄势待发、充满力量且方向明确的行动，正是创造力的载体。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: As in the material that Ruburt received ahead of time for his own use, natural aggression is cleansing and highly creative -- the thrust behind all emotions.
quotes.translation: 正如鲁柏提前收到供自己使用的资料所示，自然攻击性是净化性的、高度创造性的——是所有情感背后的驱动力。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Natural aggression is simply the power to act.
quotes.translation: 自然的攻击性不过是行动的力量。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json
